data.title: Tom Lee Buys More Than 71K ETH, Calls Crypto 'Good Wartime Store Of Value'
data.description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies, listed on NYSE as BMNR, acquired 71,179 ETH last week, increasing their total holdings to 4.73 million ETH valued at $9.8 billion. Chairman Tom Lee described cryptocurrency as a reliable store of value during times of conflict, amidst the situation with Iran. This purchase marks an uptick in Bitmine's weekly buying rate, which typically ranged from 45,000 to 50,000 ETH. Lee expressed optimism that Ethereum (ETH) is nearing the end of a "mini-crypto winter." During the fifth week of the Iran conflict, ETH and cryptocurrencies demonstrated better performance compared to the general market, with ETH surpassing equities by 1,160 basis points. In contrast, traditional safe-haven asset Gold underperformed by over 750 basis points. Lee highlighted the inverse correlation between... (The detailed article can be found on Benzinga.com)

data.title: TAP Air Portugal selects new JFK Terminal 6 for future operations
data.description: On March 30, 2026, JFK Millennium Partners (JMP) announced its selection by the Port Authority of New York & New Jersey to construct and manage Terminal 6 (T6) at John F. Kennedy International Airport. This new world-class terminal project involves a partnership with TAP Air Portugal (TAP), the national carrier. Key details such as investment amounts, construction timelines, and operational specifics were not disclosed in the press release.

data.title: Vrasio Inc. Announces Integration Partnership with Hostaway to Expand Vacation Rental Distribution
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Vrasio Inc., based in Morgan Hill, California, disclosed a new collaboration with Hostaway, a prominent property and channel management solution in the short-term rental sector. Vrasio Inc. is a contemporary platform for booking vacation rentals and hotel accommodations. This integration aims to enhance distribution channels for Vrasio Inc., setting the stage for increased visibility and bookings.

data.title: SEGG Media Aligns Leadership to Drive Revenue Execution and Growth
data.description: In Fort Worth, Texas, on March 30, 2026, Sports Entertainment Gaming Global Corporation (NASDAQ: SEGG, LTRYW) revealed the addition of Veloce executives Daniel Bailey and Jack Clarke as Chief Commercial Officer and Chief Strategy Officer, respectively. This move aims to enhance the leadership team of SEGG Media, a worldwide entity in sports, entertainment, and gaming. This strategic decision is part of SEGG Media's progression in its growth stage.

data.title: Linea introduces Yield Boost mechanism with Lido V3 to end mercenary liquidity era, increasing incentives.
data.description: Linea has introduced a new protocol-level Yield Boost mechanism that utilizes bridged ETH through Lido V3 for staking. This innovative approach aims to establish self-sustaining ecosystem incentives, all while avoiding treasury dilution. The mechanism is designed to enhance the overall yield generated. For more details, please refer to the complete article.

data.title: Early Heat Wave in Northern California Signals Urgent Need for Vehicle A/C Repairs
data.description: Residents in Sacramento, California can benefit from the Cool Air Rebate Program that covers up to 90% of expenses for fixing leaky air conditioning systems. As of March 30, 2026, amidst an unseasonably early heatwave in the state, temperatures have been soaring beyond typical ranges. This initiative is particularly crucial given the extreme weather conditions affecting various parts of California.

data.title: Hyundai World Premiere Headed to New York International Auto Show
data.description: A livestreamed press conference is scheduled for Wednesday, April 1, during media day at the 2026 New York International Auto Show. In Fountain Valley, California, on March 30, 2026, Hyundai announced that they will reveal a significant world premiere during this event. This unveiling is set to occur during a press conference at the 2026 show.
